text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
During my trip into town, I see Meisho Doto
apologetically lowering her head to the bronze
statue in front of the station.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'm so sorry about that! Do you have any injuries?
Are your clothes stained?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! So, um, I was walking, and... my legs
started feeling numb, and then I tripped, and I
bumped into this person!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
The collision was pretty strong. Look how sickly
their face is... Um, huh?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
This is a br-bronze statue? I'm apologizing to a
bronze statue? But why?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto seems to be dealing with a lot of
fatigue... I may want to rethink her race schedule.
